windows.title: Simple Ujian Browser

security.csp: default-src 'self' https://simple-ujian.web.app https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://www.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com wss://*.firebaseio.com
